x-enumeration-literals.name: Organisational Model
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines the organizational layout, business divisions, key roles and responsibilities that make up the enterprise

x-enumeration-literals.name: Business Architecture
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines the array of business capabilities and the dependencies between them required to support the business enterprise

x-enumeration-literals.name: Information Architecture
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines the key type of business information and the governance, distribution and usage of that information throughout the enterprise

x-enumeration-literals.name: Application Architecture
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines the main business requirements and information technology based application components and the exchanges between components needed to support the business

x-enumeration-literals.name: Technology Infrastructure
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines the array of interconnected technology and associated technology approaches and standards needed to support the IT based application systems employed throughout the enterprise
